$ switchyard --data-dir <DATA_DIR> --endpoint unix://<DATA_DIR>/switchyardd.sock --no-color --format json registry list drivers
exit: 0
stdout:

в”‚testdriver-mainв”‚testdriver-mainв”‚runningв”‚        в”‚
